channel.title: Japanese on 叶泽伟的博客
channel.description: Recent content in Japanese on 叶泽伟的博客

item.title: How to Learn Japanese Effectively [8]: Notes on the Textbook Irodori
item.description: Sharing organized notes and audio for the ‘いろどり’ textbook.

item.title: How to Learn Japanese Effectively [7]: Vocabulary from the Irodori Textbook
item.description: Introduces the vocabulary and accompanying audio resources in the ‘いろどり’ textbook.

item.title: How to Learn Japanese Effectively [6]: Textbook Irodori
item.description: Introduces the content features and study recommendations of the Japanese textbook ‘いろどり’.

item.title: How to Learn Japanese Effectively [4]: Kana
item.description: Introduces the structure, pronunciation, and learning techniques of Japanese kana to help build a solid foundation.

item.title: How to Learn Japanese Effectively [3]: Resources
item.description: A curated collection of recommended Japanese learning resources, tools, and practice materials for learners at all levels.

item.title: How to Learn Japanese Effectively [2]: Effective Methods
item.description: Sharing practical tips and methods to improve Japanese learning efficiency.

item.title: How to Learn Japanese Effectively [1]: Core Grammar and Sentence Structures
item.description: A structured overview of core grammar and sentence patterns to help beginners build a solid foundation in Japanese.

item.title: How to Learn Japanese Effectively [0]: Overview
